message:
fix(tutorial): fix bugs found during code review

Fixes discovered during fresh-eyes review:

1. TutorialCheckpoint.tsx:
   - CRITICAL: Fix shimmer animation using wrong Unicode minus sign (U+2212)
     instead of hyphen-minus (U+002D) which broke the animation
   - Remove unused imports (AnimatePresence, Sparkles, PartyPopper)

2. TutorialCodeBlock.tsx:
   - Remove unused imports (useMotionValue, useTransform, Copy)

3. TutorialPathCard.tsx:
   - Fix spotlight effect not following cursor - CSS custom properties
     --mouse-x and --mouse-y were never being set
   - Remove unused imports (Zap, Trophy)

4. TutorialProgress.tsx:
   - Remove unused variable highestCompleted in handleKeyDown
   - Fix empty dependency array (was including completedSteps unnecessarily)

5. TutorialStep.tsx:
   - Remove unused imports (Target, Zap)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
